context: Tests server-authoritative message handling: Zod payload validation, delta-based movement with server-side clamping, server-computed score (never from client), and rate-limiting for high-frequency move messages. A naive implementation would apply client-supplied coordinates and scores directly.

checklist.name: Payload schema validation
checklist.description: Move handler validates the incoming payload with Zod (or equivalent schema validation) before using any fields

checklist.name: Early return on invalid
checklist.description: Handler returns early (or skips mutation) if payload validation fails

checklist.name: Delta movement not absolute
checklist.description: Move handler accepts dx/dy deltas and adds them to current position — does NOT assign client-provided absolute x/y directly

checklist.name: Server-side clamping
checklist.description: Movement delta is clamped with a max bound on the server (e.g. Math.max/Math.min or equivalent)

checklist.name: Server-computed score
checklist.description: collectCoin handler increments score using server-side logic — does NOT read a score value from the client payload

checklist.name: Player lookup guard
checklist.description: Both handlers look up the player by client.sessionId and return early if not found

checklist.name: Rate limiting
checklist.description: Move handler includes rate-limiting logic (e.g. timestamp check, cooldown) to reject messages sent too frequently

checklist.name: Schema fields decorated
checklist.description: Player x, y, and score fields use @type decorator
